title: Short title
doc_html:
PART VIII.  LOCAL GOVERNMENT

EQUIPMENT-LEASE-PURCHASE

§2319.  Short title

This Part shall be known as the Local Government Equipment-Lease-Purchase Act.  

Acts 1985, No. 758, §1, eff. July 17, 1985.  

{{NOTE:  SEE ACTS 1985, NO. 758, §§5 AND 6.}}

§2319.  Short title
